name: All About Burger Glover Park

notes: All 59 frozen rows were reconciled as historical rows from a closed-and-replaced restaurant location, not current products.

All About Burger Glover Park at 2414 Wisconsin Avenue closed in 2023. The chain's current restaurant-issued site lists Clarendon, 4th Street SW, and Chinatown and contains no Glover Park or 2414 Wisconsin location.
Joia Burger's current official site identifies its active Glover Park restaurant at the exact 2414 Wisconsin Avenue address and publishes current hours.

The surviving searchable All About Burger Toast representation is stale despite recent search-engine recrawls; its address and menu do not override the closure, current-chain-location, and current-tenant evidence.
There are no current All About Burger Glover Park products, so there are no current item-level allergen claims to preserve for this location.

Twenty-one frozen rows carried official-ingredients labels inferred from the historical Toast menu. Those labels are not adjudicated as historically true or false; they are not applicable to a closed restaurant's current catalog.
The chain's current page publishes a peanut-oil warning for fries and onion rings, but it cannot be attached to the closed Glover Park location or used to revive its stale menu.
No historical row is converted into a negative or safety claim.
The frozen Toast parser successfully extracted a historical menu surface but did not verify that the restaurant entity and location were still operating.
Current-state verification must precede menu extraction: a recrawlable vendor page can remain online after the corresponding restaurant closes.
The correction removes all historical rows from this closed location and uses an idempotent guarded repair that acts only while frozen items remain.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current restaurant-issued chain menu and location page; it lists three locations and omits Glover Park and 2414 Wisconsin Avenue.
Captured a March 2023 neighborhood report documenting that All About Burger at 2414 Wisconsin Avenue closed and its listings/order links were disconnected.
Captured Joia Burger's current official page identifying its active Glover Park location and hours at 2414 Wisconsin Ave NW.

A historical 59-row menu remains discoverable through indexed Toast item pages, but it is contradicted as current evidence by the closure, current chain locations, and current tenant at the exact address.
notes: Recent crawler dates describe search-engine recrawling, not a restaurant reopening.

findings.summary: The app publishes 59 historical products for an All About Burger location that closed and was replaced by another restaurant.
findings.resolution: Removed every historical product and represented the closed-and-replaced location with no current menu.

findings.summary: Twenty-one historical rows carried official ingredient signals as though the closed Glover Park location still offered those formulations.
findings.resolution: Classified all 59 frozen rows stale_extra/not_applicable and removed the menu rather than carrying historical allergen claims into a current restaurant result.

findings.summary: The ingestion treated an indexed Toast catalog as current without checking whether the restaurant location still existed.
findings.resolution: Prepared a guarded zero-item correction backed by the audited chain's current omission, a contemporaneous closure report, and the current tenant's first-party address confirmation.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a closed-location correction that removes all 59 historical rows and leaves zero current items or allergen claims.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/all-about-burger-isolated.generated.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified zero items, removal of all historical claims, and idempotent closed-location guard behavior)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: zero formulations and zero current allergen claims because the restaurant location is closed and replaced.
